error_signature: no option to change the branch
title: No option to change branch in GitHub List Files Node
symptom: The GitHub List Files Node does not provide an option to select a specific branch for listing files and directories.
applies_when: Need to list files from a specific branch
not_this_if: Branch selection is available in the node settings
root_cause: The GitHub List Files Node currently lacks a feature to specify a branch directly within its configuration, limiting its functionality for users needing to access files from branches other than the default.
fix_steps: Use an HTTP Request node instead of the GitHub List Files Node
Replace {owner}, {repo}, {path}, and {branch} with your specific values
agent_instruction: Use an HTTP Request node to access files from a specific branch using the GitHub API.
